title: TON Connect bridge message
description: Envelope the HTTP bridge writes to a recipient's SSE stream when forwarding a message from one `client_id` to another. Bridge operators MAY add deployment-specific fields beyond those listed here. See `spec/bridge.md#bridgemessage-envelope`.

from.description: Sender `client_id` as a 64-character lowercase hex string (32-byte X25519 public key).

message.description: Base64-encoded ciphertext: 24-byte nonce concatenated with the `nacl.box` output. See `spec/session.md#encryption`.

trace_id.description: Optional UUID for analytics correlation. UUIDv7 is recommended. Set by bridges that support tracing; absent on older or tracing-unaware bridges, so readers MUST tolerate its absence. See `spec/bridge.md#trace_id--analytics-correlation`.
